issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.

This intent filter has the format of an Android App Link but is missing the `autoVerify` attribute; add `android:autoVerify="true"` to ensure your domain will be validated and enable App Link-related Lint warnings. If you do not want clicked URLs to bring the user to your app, remove the `android.intent.category.BROWSABLE` category, or set `android:autoVerify="false"` to make it clear this is not intended to be an Android App Link.
Consider splitting data tag into multiple tags with individual attributes to avoid confusion
Consider splitting data tag into multiple tags with individual attributes to avoid confusion
Redundant label can be removed

"home_special_mission_delete_main" is not translated in "pt" (Portuguese)

issue.message: "home_special_mission_delete_dismiss" is not translated in "pt" (Portuguese)
"home_special_mission_delete_remove" is not translated in "pt" (Portuguese)
Formatting %d followed by words ("credits"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("credits"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("credits"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("characters"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("steps"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("times"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("battles"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("vitals"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("steps"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("times"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("battles"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("vitals"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 28. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
This initialization lambda (`{0}`) is unnecessary and is less efficient
This initialization lambda (`{0}`) is unnecessary and is less efficient

issue.errorLine1: <string name="action_place_near_reader">Aproxime o seu Vital Bracelet do leitor...</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="action_place_near_reader">Place your Vital Bracelet near the reader...</string>

issue.message: The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
Consider whether this feature (`android.hardware.nfc`) really is required for the app to function; you can set `android:required="false"` to indicate that the feature is used but not required
Use the KTX extension function `Bitmap.scale` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?

Use the KTX function `createBitmap` instead?
Use the KTX function `createBitmap` instead?
Use version catalog instead (androidx.navigation:navigation-compose is already available as `androidx-navigation-compose`, but using version 2.9.6 instead)
Use version catalog instead (com.google.android.material:material is already available as `material`, but using version 1.13.0 instead)
Use version catalog instead
Use version catalog instead (androidx.datastore:datastore-preferences is already available as `androidx-datastore-preferences`, but using version 1.2.0 instead)
